creator: christophe.pedretti@netcourrier.com
text:
When the machine is connected to the internet through an ADSL
connexion using ppp and PPPoE sometime the box hangs

The machine is a Toshiba Satellite 320CDT with a xircom
ethernet adapter.

How-To-Repeat: ping -s 1464 internetHost : OK
ping -s 1465 internetHost : HANGS with error message
/kernel: couldn't m_pullup
